name: Cappuccino
description: A rich and creamy cappuccino made with freshly brewed espresso, steamed milk, and a frothy milk cap. This delightful drink offers a perfect balance of bold coffee flavor and smooth milk, making it an ideal companion for relaxing mornings or lively conversations.

name: Jumbo Savory Scone
description: Deliciously flaky and buttery, this jumbo savory scone is filled with herbs and cheese, creating a mouthwatering experience. Perfect for a hearty snack or a light lunch, it pairs beautifully with your favorite coffee or tea.

name: Latte
description: Smooth and creamy, our latte combines rich espresso with velvety steamed milk, creating a perfect balance of flavor and texture. Enjoy it as a comforting treat any time of day, whether you're starting your morning or taking a midday break.

name: Chocolate Chip Biscotti
description: Crunchy and delightful, this chocolate chip biscotti is perfect for dipping in your coffee or enjoying on its own. Each bite offers a satisfying crunch and a burst of rich chocolate, making it a favorite for any biscotti lover.

name: Espresso shot
description: A bold shot of rich espresso, our espresso is crafted from the finest beans to deliver a robust flavor in every sip. Perfect for a quick pick-me-up, it can also serve as a base for your favorite coffee drinks.

name: Hazelnut Biscotti
description: These delicious hazelnut biscotti are perfect for a crunchy treat alongside your coffee. Infused with roasted hazelnuts, they provide a delightful nutty flavor that enhances your coffee experience.

name: Chocolate Croissant
description: Flaky and buttery, our chocolate croissant is filled with rich chocolate, making it a delightful pastry for any time. Perfect for breakfast or an afternoon snack, it's a sweet indulgence that never disappoints.

name: Dark chocolate
description: Rich and indulgent, our dark chocolate drinking chocolate is made with premium cocoa. This luxurious beverage is perfect for a cozy treat on a chilly day, bringing warmth and comfort with every sip.

name: Cranberry Scone
description: This delightful cranberry scone combines sweet and tart flavors, making it perfect for a breakfast treat or afternoon snack. Soft and crumbly, it pairs wonderfully with tea or coffee for a comforting experience.

name: Croissant
description: Our classic croissant is flaky and buttery, offering a delightful crunch with each bite. Whether enjoyed alone or filled with your favorite spread, it's a timeless pastry that elevates any meal.

name: Almond Croissant
description: A delightful twist on the classic croissant, filled with almond cream and topped with slivered almonds for added crunch. This indulgent treat is perfect for those who love a sweet and nutty flavor combination.

name: Ginger Biscotti
description: These spicy ginger biscotti are perfect for dipping and provide a delightful crunch with every bite. The warm flavor of ginger adds a unique twist that pairs beautifully with your favorite hot beverage.

name: Oatmeal Scone
description: Nutty and wholesome, our oatmeal scone is a perfect snack for any time. Made with rolled oats and a hint of sweetness, it's a satisfying option for those who enjoy hearty baked goods.

name: Ginger Scone
description: Soft and fragrant, our ginger scone is perfect for a morning treat, infused with the warm spice of ginger. It's an inviting option that pairs beautifully with a cup of tea or coffee.

name: Chocolate syrup
description: Our rich chocolate syrup is perfect for drizzling over desserts or adding to your favorite beverages. Its velvety texture and intense chocolate flavor make it an essential topping for any sweet creation.

name: Hazelnut syrup
description: Add a nutty flavor to your drinks with our hazelnut syrup, perfect for lattes and desserts. Its smooth sweetness enhances a variety of beverages, making it a must-have for coffee lovers.

name: Carmel syrup
description: Sweet and creamy, our caramel syrup is ideal for topping your drinks and desserts with a rich caramel flavor. This versatile syrup elevates everything from coffee to ice cream, providing a luscious touch.

name: Sugar Free Vanilla syrup
description: Enjoy the sweet flavor of vanilla without the sugar, making it perfect for your coffee or dessert. This syrup offers a guilt-free way to enhance your beverages, ensuring you never miss out on flavor.

name: Americano
description: Classic espresso diluted with hot water, yielding a smooth, black coffee profile with the full-bodied spirit of espresso.

name: Flat White
description: A sophisticated balance of micro-foamed milk poured over a double shot of espresso for a silky texture.

name: Cortado
description: Equal parts espresso and warm milk to reduce the acidity while maintaining the bold coffee flavor.

name: Macchiato
description: A bold espresso 'marked' with a small dollop of frothy milk, perfect for those who like a punchy caffeine kick.

name: Affogato
description: A blissful dessert-coffee hybrid: a scoop of premium vanilla bean gelato 'drowned' in a hot shot of espresso.

name: Classic Cold Brew
description: Steeped for 18 hours in small batches for an ultra-smooth, low-acid, and naturally sweet caffeine hit.

name: Vanilla Cloud Cold Brew
description: Our signature cold brew topped with a light, airy layer of vanilla-infused cold foam.

name: Nitro Cold Brew
description: Infused with nitrogen for a velvety, stout-like texture and a naturally creamy head.

name: Iced Caramel Macchiato
description: Layers of milk and espresso over ice, finished with a generous drizzle of our house caramel sauce.

name: Iced Matcha Latte
description: Premium ceremonial grade matcha whisked with milk and served over ice for a vibrant, earthy energy boost.

name: Midnight Cocoa Cold Brew
description: A dark, intense cold brew blended with subtle hints of Peruvian cocoa for a chocolatey finish.

name: Pumpkin Spice Latte
description: The autumn classic: espresso and steamed milk with warm spices (cinnamon, nutmeg, cloves) and real pumpkin.

name: Peppermint Mocha
description: A winter favorite featuring bittersweet chocolate, peppermint syrup, espresso, and steamed milk.

name: Mango Passion Iced Tea
description: Tropical bliss in a cup: hand-shaken herbal tea with mango and passion fruit purée.

name: Honey Lavender Latte
description: A fragrant, calming blend of espresso, floral lavender, and organic local honey.

name: Oat Milk Honey Latte
description: Creamy oat milk perfectly paired with rich espresso and a touch of wild honey.

name: Acai Berry Bowl
description: Frozen acai purée topped with granola, fresh berries, sliced banana, and a drizzle of honey.

name: Avocado Smash Toast
description: Zesty mashed avocado on sourdough bread with chili flakes, seeds, and a squeeze of lemon.

name: Vegan Blueberry Muffin
description: Light, moist, and bursting with fresh blueberries — made without any animal products.

name: Quinoa Veggie Salad
description: A colorful mix of roasted seasonal veggies, fluffy quinoa, and a tangy balsamic vinaigrette.

name: Blueberry Scone
description: Crumbly and sweet, packed with plump blueberries and finished with a sugary glaze.

name: Spinach & Feta Swirl
description: Savory puff pastry filled with creamy feta cheese and tender sautéed spinach.

name: Pain au Chocolat
description: Classic French pastry with buttery layers and two bars of rich dark chocolate hidden inside.

name: Berry Danish
description: Sweet yeast pastry with a custard center topped with fresh seasonal berries and a honey glaze.

name: Pecan Brownie
description: Fudgy, dense chocolate brownie topped with crunchy toasted pecans.

name: Banana Nut Bread
description: Moist and dense loaf made with overripe bananas and crunchy walnuts.

name: Lemon Poppyseed Cake
description: Zesty lemon sponge cake with crunchy poppyseeds and a tart lemon icing.

name: Cinnamon Roll
description: Soft brioche dough swirled with cinnamon sugar and topped with thick cream cheese frosting.

name: White Chocolate Mocha
description: Smooth white chocolate sauce combined with espresso and perfectly steamed milk.

name: Mexican Hot Chocolate
description: A spicy twist on hot cocoa: rich chocolate with hints of cinnamon and a kick of chili.

name: Salted Caramel Cocoa
description: Velvety hot chocolate enhanced with sea salt and buttery caramel syrup.

name: Ethiopia Yirgacheffe (250g)
description: Single-origin beans featuring bright floral notes and a clean, citrusy acidity.

name: Sumatra Mandheling (250g)
description: Full-bodied and low-acid beans with earthy, mossy notes and a smooth finish.

name: Brazil Santos (250g)
description: Naturally low-acid beans with nutty, chocolaty undertones and a mellow profile.

name: House Blend (500g)
description: Our balanced signature blend, perfect for both espresso and filter brewing.

name: Irish Cream Syrup
description: Rich and creamy with hints of vanilla and cocoa, inspired by traditional Irish spirits.

name: Cinnamon Syrup
description: Sweet syrup infused with the warm, woody spice of premium cinnamon bark.

name: Pumpkin Spice Syrup
description: Warm autumn spices blended into a sweet syrup, essential for any festive drink.

name: Toffee Nut Syrup
description: A buttery, sweet syrup with the aroma of toasted nuts and rich toffee.

name: White Chocolate Sauce
description: A thick, velvety sauce made with real cocoa butter for the ultimate indulgence.
